example: Alt+Shift-drag the orb onto a folder/app/file: a pin ring lights while the orb is over a valid target, then the captured tile lands first on the rim along a guided arc

variants.focus: Fast, restrained feedback with no overshoot.
A visible arrival with a small overshoot and settle.
Affected elements move in a short sequence so the reflow is easy to follow.
A curved path makes the source and destination relationship explicit.
